summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Apex Academy motorsports platform with new Engineer Mode, Trajectory Simulator, and Enhanced Telemetry features. All major functionality working perfectly with 100% backend API success rate and 98% frontend functionality success.
passed_tests: Backend API Root (35 cars, 36 tracks)
GET /api/tracks (36 tracks with correct structure)
GET /api/tracks/monza (track detail)
GET /api/cars (35 cars: 10 F1, 14 GT3, 11 GT4)
GET /api/cars?category=gt3 (14 GT3 cars)
GET /api/telemetry/monza/ferrari_296_gt3 (telemetry data)
GET /api/telemetry/spa/porsche_992_gt3_r (telemetry data)
GET /api/quizzes (4 quizzes)
POST /api/quizzes/braking_basics/submit (quiz submission)
GET /api/news (8 news items)
GET /api/glossary (glossary terms)
Engineer Mode page loads with car/track selectors (35 cars, 36 tracks)
Engineer Mode setup sliders functional (Aero, Suspension, Tires, Diff tabs)
Engineer Mode car selection updates setup values from car data
Engineer Mode performance analysis bars update when sliders change
Trajectory Simulator page loads with Monza track canvas
Trajectory Simulator can switch between Monza and Spa tracks
Trajectory Simulator interactive drawing and scoring system
Enhanced Telemetry /telemetry/monza/ferrari_296_gt3 loads with 5 tabs
Enhanced Telemetry summary cards show max speed, avg speed, lat G, brake G
Enhanced Telemetry all 5 tabs functional (Combined, Speed, Inputs, Gear, G-Forces)
Tracks page shows 36 tracks with simulator badges (ACC, iRacing, F1 25)
Track detail page has corner notes and braking downshift patterns
Track detail telemetry tab has 'Full Analysis' button linking to telemetry
Navigation has Engineer and Simulator links working correctly
